name: Ups and Downs in the Sea of Love
overview: After being dumped by her fiancé, Yama meets cruise director Jason, who consoles her. They fall in love and get married immediately. However, when her ex-fiancé wants her back, Jason and Yama have a misunderstanding that causes them to divorce just as immediately. When they reunite on a cruise ship, havoc occurs.

trailers.title: 十萬噸情緣 | 張可頤 & 張家輝 | Jason x Yama | 全速前進 MV
